home.title: BUKHARA TOUR
home.description: Discover ancient madrasahs, majestic minarets, and vibrant bazaars in one of Central Asia's most captivating cities. Let history, architecture, and authentic Uzbek hospitality create an unforgettable journey.
home.exploreCities: Explore Uzbekistan's most iconic cities and hidden gems

options.privateDescription: Enjoy a fully personalized journey across Uzbekistan with a private guide, flexible schedule, and exclusive experiences tailored just for you
options.groupDescription: Explore Uzbekistan's rich heritage with like-minded travelers in a well-organized, affordable group experience.
options.culturalExperiences: Cultural experiences tailored to your interests
options.fillForm: Fill the form and we will contact you shortly.

tourSelect.registanDesc: Explore the heart of ancient Samarkand.
tourSelect.guremirDesc: The resting place of Amir Timur.
tourSelect.bibikhanyDesc: One of the largest mosques in the Islamic world.
tourSelect.shahizindaDesc: A sacred pilgrimage site with azure mausoleums.
